intended_use: AI Platform 2.0 is intended for noninvasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease.
intended_use_full: AI Platform 2.0 is intended for noninvasive processing of ultrasound images to detect, measure, and calculate relevant medical parameters of structures and function of patients with suspected disease. In addition, it can provide Quality Score feedback to assist healthcare professionals, trained and qualified to conduct echocardiography and lung ultrasound scans in the current standard of care while acquiring ultrasound images. The device is intended to be used on images of adult patients.
target_condition: suspected cardiac and pulmonary disease in adult patients
ground_truth: Ground truth for wall thickness and IVC measurements was obtained as the average measurement of three expert readers; Quality AI was compared to quality ratings by experienced sonographers
other_metrics: Interclass correlation (ICC) for IVSd: 0.93 (95% CI 0.89–0.96); ICC for PWd: 0.94 (95% CI 0.89–0.97); ICC for IVC Dmin: 0.93 (95% CI 0.90–0.95); ICC for IVC Dmax: 0.94 (95% CI 0.90–0.96); Quality AI ICC for frames: 0.94 (95% CI 0.94–0.95); Quality AI ICC for clips: 0.94 (95% CI 0.92–0.95); 98.3% of clips rated ACEP quality 3+ by expert readers received at least 'Minimum criteria met for diagnosis' by Quality AI; 98.0% of scans rated 'Minimal criteria met' or 'good' by Quality AI deemed diagnostic by experts (ACEP ≥3)
